title: Dragonfly
description: A performance/QoL modpack for Fabric, built on Sodium and voxy
body:
# Dragonfly

A performance/QoL modpack for Fabric, heavily inspired by
[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).

This pack features [voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy) for insane render
distances. It is meant for both multiplayer and singleplayer use. Much like
Fabulously Optimized, there are also some mods included that reimplement
OptiFine features.
